positive: A highly stylized, minimalist design featuring a lone mountain silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sunrise. The mountain range should have sharp, dramatic peaks and appear geometrically perfect. The sunrise gradient transitions from deep indigo at the top to warm gold and soft coral at the bottom, creating a strong vertical color split. Include a few abstract, stylized constellation elements (like simple geometric stars or lines) orbiting the peaks to enhance the cosmic, ethereal feel. The composition must be centered, utilizing negative space effectively for clean, print-friendly apparel artwork. Vector art style, high contrast, flat graphic aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, clean lines, vibrant colors, maximal symmetry.
negative: blurry, low quality, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, multiple subjects, messy, grain, poor anatomy, low contrast, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, messy background elements
